verdict: An exceptionally well-timed chart with great physical flow, though a couple of patterns are slightly too complex/fast for a typical Easy difficulty.

issues.problem: An 8th-note jump (JUMP LR immediately following 28.459 tap U) is too physically demanding for an Easy chart.
JUMP DR occurs immediately after an 8th-note transition (31.674 tap D -> 31.888 tap U), which is too complex for players at the Easy level.
The 8th-note tap at 2.950 during HOLD L requires advanced foot independence (co-holding) for an Easy chart.
Holding D while tapping U (37.890) and L (38.319) is a Medium-level pattern that may confuse beginners.
